review_title: Noetix Views and Analytics are flexible and great reporting solutions.
description: Very happy with customer support and very good reporting solution with very handy features.
author: Subhash Reddy K.
pros: Noetix Views and Noetix Analytics are user friendly and very flexible to implement as per required business use cases. Customer support is very prompt and supportive. Highly integrated with Oracle EBS to capture changes after upgrade.
cons: Noetix Analytics customizations are complex and should be more user friendly.

review_title: Single Application to Manage Operational Reporting
description: Noetix Views flexible to customize and user friendly operational reporting solutions.
author: Ashwani P.
pros: Noetx Views are user friendly and Easy-to-use application for operational reporting for business productivity and collaboration, reports are flawless and protected from application and database structural change with version upgrades. Fast and structured customizations available as per use case and rich set of prebuilt module specific views available along with fast metadata search functionality using the noetix search.
cons: Difficult and time taking to debug the error during view regeneration as error list displayed at the end of regeneration process.

author: Daniel C.
pros: From user point of view, it is easy to use and can implement a reporting environment
cons: It is better for mid size business or large enterprises only as it need a report team to set up and maintain the application

author: Govind B.
pros: The pre-built templates are particularly helpful, allowing for efficient customization to meet specific needs. The tool's integration with existing databases is seamless, ensuring that data retrieval is fast and reliable. Customer service has been responsive and knowledgeable.
cons: So far everything is fine, except that dependency with SQL Server Database, since we are more of an Oracle shop.

author: Giri D.
pros: Ease of use and user friendly. Provides insightful business reports

author: Srinivasareddy N.
pros: Angles for Oracle (Noetix Products) is an excellent product for addressing the business needs of Oracle EBS, providing robust enterprise-level reporting solutions.

description: Overall experience is very good as its easy to configure, use and is reliable.
author: Rajesh Y.
pros: Its reliable and very easy to use. Support staff are very co-operative and prompt to reply on issue. Setting/configuration up is simple.
cons: Data retrieval is good but in some places tuning is needed. Views generation can be to optimised to reduce regeneration time.

review_title: A very handy tool with a lot of features
description: Easy to use and very useful tool for reporting.
author: Madhava S.
pros: Many features like query, email, schedules jobs etc
cons: Lack of Training material for developers and users

author: Mohammed S.
pros: Easy to use and reliable product. More supportive for Operational and Analytical Reporting.
cons: Nothing to say least about Angles Enterprise for Oracle.

description: It's kind of roller coaster for us to use Angles for Hub. Have reported more than 15+ Bugs and good thing product team able to support and resolve all the reported bugs.
author: Santhosh Kumar N.
pros: Easy to use. Easier metadata management.
cons: Some basic features are not working. Few issues are intermittent.

description: Analytics is the best out of Angles Enterprise for Oracle
author: Suresh T.
pros: Analytics is the best part of "Angles Enterprise for Oracle" I liked.
cons: Nothing to say least about Angles Enterprise for Oracle
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mahraj M.
pros: Easy to use and reliable product. More supportive from the consultants and the ISW support team.
cons: setting up with the reports and maintenance
